sign.verdanto_7_9.title: Sign: Verdanto Path
sign.verdanto_7_9.text: Watch out for the bromeliads — they store water.
sign.verdanto_20_12.title: Sign: Strangler Fig Sector
sign.verdanto_20_12.text: Behind the tall vines, rare encounters await.
sign.kaktoria_8_7.title: Sign: Desert Path
sign.kaktoria_8_7.text: Water is scarce here. Always carry Aloe juice.
sign.kaktoria_22_11.title: Sign: Saguaro Grove
sign.kaktoria_22_11.text: Giant cacti can live for 100 years.

sign.salzbucht_7_6.title: Sign: Beach Path
sign.salzbucht_21_11.title: Sign: Mangrove Islands
sign.salzbucht_21_11.text: Brackish water — some plants love it.
sign.mordwald_8_5.title: Sign: Swamp Path
sign.mordwald_8_5.text: Follow the wooden walkway or you will sink.

sign.magmabluete_22_12.text: The Magma Heart awaits at the top.

building.markt.text: Market Hall: Come back when the market is open.
